content:
B1: FIX: 27/120 = 0.225 is right for exact rho_s ≥ 0.5 under a uniform random permutation over 5 distinct means, but the predicate is a bit fragile: “all-tied = non-success” is fine only if ties are impossible after averaging; if ties can arise, the null and rate should explicitly define tie handling. Also, a monotone rate over 40 verbs can still be inflated by any systematic length/definiteness bias, so the “beats chance” label does not by itself certify true tracking unless the matched condition and monotonicity are both pre-committed as the target.  
B2: FIX: Using ALTERNATING-ONLY rho as the binding control is directionally right, but making it a conjunct for TRACKS is not enough if the control is evaluated post hoc or with a loose CI rule. A memorized subcategorization split can still produce a positive alternating-only rho if the 100 alternating verbs are unevenly distributed in frequency/lexical neighborhoods; you need an explicit criterion that the control must be positive on the alternating set and not merely “not failed.”  
B3: OK: The recipient lexicalization setup looks like a faithful factor match: word-count and definiteness are held constant to DAIS levels while lexical items are disjoint, and the contamination firewall is materially stronger than a mere theme/recipient overlap check. Fix only if the “the girl from college / a girl from college” vs DAIS “the man from work / a man from work” mapping is not truly parallel in surface length and article position. Holding the theme fixed and letting it cancel across DOC/PD is acceptable if the theme is identical across both alternatives; no obvious asymmetry there.  
BANDS: FIX: The tree is not fully un-gameable because a weak result can still be rhetorically upgraded into SURFACE-ONLY / VERB-BIAS-ONLY even when the effect is marginal or control-sensitive, and the “>=2/3 models” threshold can hide one strong memorizer behind two weak positives. CONTAMINATION-CEILING is not a real fence; it is only a warning, since rho >= 0.95 can occur for reasons other than memorization and rho < 0.95 does not rule memorization out. The banding is close, but success labels remain too easy to re-read as stronger than warranted.  
OVERALL: GO-WITH-CONDITIONS
